query:
SELECT l.id, l.firstName, l.lastName, l.email, l.postalCode, l.assignedPartnerId, p.companyName 
FROM leads l 
LEFT JOIN partners p ON p.id = l.assignedPartnerId 
WHERE l.id = 90001;
